chapter_title.ar: بَابُ يَوْمِ النَّحْرِ وَ مُبْتَدَإِ الرَّمْيِ وَ فَضْلِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 173 – The day of the sacrifice, and beginning the pelting (of the Jamarah), and its merits

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/145)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/145)
text: رَمَى أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) الْجَمْرَةَ الْعُظْمَى فَرَأَى النَّاسَ وُقُوفاً فَقَامَ وَسْطَهُمْ ثُمَّ نَادَى بِأَعْلَى صَوْتِهِ أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ إِنَّ هَذَا لَيْسَ بِمَوْقِفٍ ثَلَاثَ مَرَّاتٍ فَفَعَلْتُ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad,f rom Muhammad Bin Sinan, from Ibn Muskan, from Saeed Al Roumy who said,

‘Abu Abdullahasws pelted Al-Jamarah Al-Uzmah (the bigger Jamarah), so heasws saw the people having paused. So heasws stood up in their midst, then called out in a loud voice of hisasws: ‘O you people! This is not a Pausing Stop!’ – three times. So I did it (as well)’.
en.sarwar: 5. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn Sinan from ibn Muskan from Sa‘id al- Rumiy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, threw pebbles on al-Jamarah al-‘Uzma’ and saw people standing. He (the Imam) stood in their middle and announced with the height of his voice, ‘O people, this is not a station’, three times, and I did it (as he (the Imam) had done).”
